search.query: | tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies by anomalies.nd_host | rename anomalies.nd_host as nd_host
| tstats `summariesonly` values(anomalies.fabricName) as fabricName from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" | mvexpand fabricName

| tstats `summariesonly` values(anomalies.anomalyScore) as score from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by _time, anomalies.fabricName | rename anomalies.fabricName as sites | timechart span=1h eval(round(avg(score),2)) by sites | fields - NULL

| tstats `summariesonly` dc(anomalies.anomalyId) as count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by anomalies.category, anomalies.anomalyId, anomalies.nd_host, anomalies.fabricName | rename anomalies.category as category | stats sum(count) by category

chart.title: Anomalies by Severity
chart.search: >| tstats `summariesonly` dc(anomalies.anomalyId) as count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by anomalies.calculated_severity, anomalies.anomalyId, anomalies.nd_host, anomalies.fabricName | rename anomalies.calculated_severity as severity | stats sum(count) by severity $time_token.earliest$ $time_token.latest$

search.query: | tstats `summariesonly` latest(anomalies.anomalyScore) as anomalyScore values(anomalies.node_names) as "Node" latest(anomalies.severity) as "Severity" from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by anomalies.anomalyId, anomalies.nd_host, anomalies.fabricName | mvexpand "Node" | rename anomalies.nd_host as "Host" anomalies.fabricName as "Site" | sort 0 -anomalyScore, Node | dedup "Node" | head 10 | table "Node", "Severity", "Host", "Site"

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by anomalies.category | rename anomalies.category as category

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by anomalies.severity | rename anomalies.severity as severity

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by anomalies.node_names | rename anomalies.node_names as node_names

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by anomalies.cleared | rename anomalies.cleared as cleared

| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" by anomalies.resourceType | rename anomalies.resourceType as resourceType

panel.single:
$result.count$
| tstats `summariesonly` dc(anomalies.anomalyId) as count from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" $set_severity_token$ anomalies.category="$category_token$" anomalies.node_names="$nodes_token$" anomalies.cleared="$clear_token$" anomalies.resourceType="$resourceType_token$" by anomalies.anomalyId, anomalies.nd_host, anomalies.fabricName | stats sum(count) as count | fillnull value=0 count | appendpipe [ stats count as count | where count==0 | eval count=0 ] $time_token.earliest$ $time_token.latest$ >none progressbar

search.query: | tstats `summariesonly` latest(anomalies.entityName) as _entity latest(anomalies.category) as _category latest(anomalies.nd_host) as "Host" latest(anomalies.fabricName) as "Site" latest(anomalies.severity) as "Severity" latest(anomalies.startTs) as "Detection Time (UTC)" latest(anomalies.endTs) as "Last Seen Time (UTC)" latest(anomalies.resourceType) as "Resource Type" latest(anomalies.anomalyStr) as "Description" values(anomalies.node_names) as "Nodes" latest(anomalies.cleared) as "Cleared" from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.nd_host="$nd_host_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$site_token$" $set_severity_token$ anomalies.category="$category_token$" anomalies.node_names="$nodes_token$" anomalies.cleared="$clear_token$" anomalies.resourceType="$resourceType_token$" by anomalies.anomalyId, anomalies.nd_host, anomalies.fabricName | rename anomalies.anomalyId as _id | sort 0 "Severity", -"Last Seen Time (UTC)" | table _id, _category, _entity, _group, "Host", "Site", "Severity","Detection Time (UTC)", "Last Seen Time (UTC)", "Resource Type", "Nodes", "Description", "Cleared"

drilldown.set: anomalies.nd_host="$ndHost_token$" anomalies.fabricName="$row.Site$" anomalies.anomalyId="$row._id$" anomalies.startTs="$row.Detection Time (UTC)$" anomalies.endTs="$row.Last Seen Time (UTC)$" anomalies.cleared=$row.Cleared$ anomalies.severity="$row.Severity$" anomalies.resourceType="$row.Resource Type$" anomalies.anomalyStr="$row.Description$" anomalies.category="$row._category$"

search.query: | tstats `summariesonly` values(anomalies.entityName) as "Affected Object" values(anomalies.node_names) as "Nodes" values(anomalies.startTs) as "Detection Time (UTC)" values(anomalies.endTs) as "End Time (UTC)" values(anomalies.clearTs) as cleared_time values(anomalies.anomalyStr) as "Description" values(anomalies.category) as "Category" values(anomalies.acknowledged) as "Acknowledged" values(anomalies.verificationStatus) as "Verification Status" values(anomalies.assignee) as "Assignee" values(anomalies.resourceType) as "Type" from datamodel=Cisco_DCN_nexus_dashboard.anomalies where anomalies.entityName="$entity_token$" $search_token$ | eval Status=if($cleared_token$ == "false", "Active", "Cleared"), "Cleared Time (UTC)"=if(cleared_time="null" OR isnull(cleared_time),"-",cleared_time) | eval "Explore Anomaly Details" = "Open on ND" | table "Status", "Affected Object", "Nodes", "Detection Time (UTC)", "End Time (UTC)", "Cleared Time (UTC)", "Description", "Category", "Type", "Verification Status", "Acknowledged", "Assignee", "Explore Anomaly Details"
